  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

RBMS_SCPU_V01

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 18DADCF1
Recv ID: 18DAF1DC
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: DC
Func Name: LBC2

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "5",
    "supplier": "E2-CAD",
    "soft": "3000",
    "version": "0000"
  },
  {
    "diagversion": "69",
    "supplier": "E2-CAD",
    "soft": "3700",
    "version": "0000"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 7072,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Low voltage supply input (SCPU)"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 7073,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Cell input lines (SCPU)"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 7074,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Insulation Resistance meacurement circuit"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 7075,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "SCPU/PCB temperature sensor"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 7076,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Current sensor input (SCPU)"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 7085,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Internal memory RAM/ROM (SCPU)"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 7086,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "External NV memory (EEPROM, FLASH) SCPU"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 7093,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CAN current sensor (SCPU)"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 7089,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Safety CPU/Slave Communication"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 7090,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "2nd ASSP (redundancy)"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 7092,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Pack module temperature sensor (SCPU)"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 7091,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Hot Spot (SPARE) sensor"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 57667,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CAN from EVC/HEVC"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 57668,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CAN from BMS1"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 6927,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Int_tron"
  }
]
